case_title: HENRIKSEN, SIGNE et al VS RAINSFORD, KATHY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HENRIKSEN, SIGNE GASKILL, JESSICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAINSFORD, KATHY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HENRIKSEN, SIGNE GASKILL, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT RAINSFORD, KATHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAINSFORD, KATHY
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION: DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE AND ORDER OF DENIAL SENT TO BOTH PARTIES WITH CLERK'S NOTICE OF MAILING.
PLTF'S FILING MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION, PAID $14 CHECK, TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS. FOLDER FOR CALENDARING(COPY TO PLTF,COPIES SENT TO DEFT).
